title: Feature test scenarios
description: Test matrix for a feature under test/features/<feature-id>/: environments, modes, options, and which generated test scripts to run.

defaults.description: Per-feature defaults merged into every scenario (lowest precedence after test/features/defaults.shared.yaml).

^(?!defaults$)[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$.description: One named scenario in the feature test matrix.

description.description: Human-readable summary of what this scenario exercises.

envs.description: Environment keys from test/environments.yaml. May be inherited from defaults.

modes.description: Test execution modes. Defaults to [devcontainer, standalone] when omitted.

tests.description: Test script IDs from checks.yaml (without a .sh suffix).

options.description: Feature option key/value pairs merged with defaults (scenario wins).

additionalProperties.description: Feature option value as passed to the installer.

setup.description: Shell commands run inside the container before install. In devcontainer mode these are baked into the generated Dockerfile as RUN layers.

expect_install_failure.description: When true, the installer must exit non-zero. The runner validates install output against every kind: install_failure pattern in the scenario checks. In devcontainer mode the test container never starts, so only install_failure checks may be present when devcontainer is listed in modes.

fast_net_fail.description: When true, set DEVFEATS_NET_FETCH_RETRIES=1 and DEVFEATS_NET_FETCH_DELAY=0 for the install so unreachable-host fetch failures finish quickly. Use for expected network fetch failures when standalone.network is not none. standalone.network: none implies this automatically.

args.description: Additional CLI arguments forwarded to install.sh (rare; prefer options).

env_vars.description: Extra environment variables set for the install invocation.

test_shell.description: Shell invocation style for generated test scripts in standalone mode.

devcontainer.description: Mode-specific overrides applied when generating devcontainer.json test projects.

remoteUser.description: devcontainer.json remoteUser for the test project.

containerUser.description: devcontainer.json containerUser for the test project.

standalone.description: Mode-specific overrides for standalone Docker test runs.

user.description: Run generated test scripts as this user (install still runs as root unless skip_install is used).

sudo.description: When false, do not use sudo when switching to standalone.user.

network.description: Docker network mode for the standalone container.

skip_install.description: When true, the runner does not invoke install.sh; the test script must install explicitly.
